changelog: ONLY FOR TESTING THE BOARD
Initial release. Features: Basic robot control.
Changed Baud Rate of cow to 38400 from 115200, Fixed accel and decel
Fixed Turn direction
Changed default acceleration to 0.04 and deceleration to 0.06 values for smoother operation.
Changed default deceleration to 0.07.
Fixed second Cow Address.
Added coast threshold feature.
Remote Initial release. Features: Basic robot control.
Trim adjustments are applied when straight_mode is enabled. Enhanced tap detection logic for forward/backward/turns. Power-off routine improvements.
Fixed issue with double tap detection for forward and backward movements. If Pressed and hold then tap was not switching between fast and slow mode
Fixed Slow Mode allowing double tap
Increased Pivot Speed from 25-175 to 25-475.
Fixed issue saving values and added turn
Do not use! Able to change the turn speed when moving
Do not use! Fixed issue moving to the right turn was flipped
Fixed Directions.
Added usb support for the Configurator Cow 2 is now usable
Fixed issue with not saving settings.
Defaulted turn to only 10 clicks and reset to minimum value.
Button Debounce RF ISSUE
Added Record and Playback functionality.
Fixed issue with not saving settings.
To play the recording now you have to hold the play button then on release will play
Changed play from 2 sec to 1 sec, auto shutdown increased to 7 min.
OB_OptionBytes, LSI_RTC_ErrataFix, Fixed playback issue when drive and turn where recorded at the same time.
